tracks.rawText: 4:10❤️🔥 Too Strong Too Soon [2275376921]UploadCinematic pop rock with orchestral elements, Features a powerful female lead vocal with a wide dynamic range, transitioning from intimate chest voice to soaring belted head voice, Instrumentation consists of a grand piano playing rhythmic block chords, a driving drum kit with heavy compression on the snare, and a thick synth bass, A full string section provides staccato rhythmic ostinatos in the verses and expansive legato pads in the choruses, Distorted electric guitar power chords enter during the climaxes, The arrangement uses dramatic dynamic shifts and heavy reverb on the vocals, 152 BPM, Key of G Minor, 4/4 time3PublishRemix
tracks.title: ❤️🔥 Too Strong Too Soon [2275376921]
